name: Key Lime Bar Cookies/Dessert Show
recipeIngredient: (Nellie & Joe's in the Bottle, available in most supermarkets, or use
the juice of regular limes from the supermarket.)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Crust: Combine flour, powdered sugar, and softened butter in a large bowl. Mix with an electric mixer until crumbly. Press mixture into the bottom of an ungreased 9 by 13 inch pan. Bake for 20-30 minutes or until light golden brown.
Filling: Beat together eggs, sugar, flour, and baking powder until blended. Stir in lime juice and beat again until well combined. Pour filling over warm crust. Return to oven and bake another 25-30 minutes or until top is light golden brown. Cool completely.
Icing: Mix powdered sugar and lime juice until the mixture reaches a spreading consistency (add more juice if necessary). Spread icing over top and cut into bars.
